fields.name: record_id
fields.description: Stable unique identifier for one binding measurement record.

fields.name: aptamer_sequence
fields.description: Nucleotide sequence of the aptamer (DNA or RNA), 5' to 3'.
fields.normalization_rule: Uppercase; remove spaces and hyphens; keep only A,C,G,T,U.

fields.name: target_name
fields.description: Name of the protein or biomolecular target.

fields.name: target_type
fields.description: Broad classification of the target (e.g. enzyme, receptor, toxin).

fields.name: measurement_type
fields.description: Reported affinity or binding metric (Kd, Ki, IC50, etc.).

fields.name: measurement_value
fields.description: Numeric value as reported in the source.

fields.name: measurement_unit
fields.description: Unit of measurement_value (nM, μM, pM, etc.).
fields.normalization_rule: Map synonyms to nM, μM, pM, M; store original in notes if converted.

fields.name: normalized_value_nm
fields.description: Binding affinity converted to nanomolar (nM) for comparison.
fields.normalization_rule: Convert measurement_value using measurement_unit to nM.

fields.name: assay_method
fields.description: Experimental method used to obtain the measurement.

fields.name: buffer
fields.description: Buffer composition during the binding assay.

fields.name: source_id
fields.description: Identifier linking to an entry in specs/source_map.json.

fields.name: source_type
fields.description: Category of source (paper, database, web page, etc.).

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: URL or landing page for the source.

fields.name: extraction_method
fields.description: How the record was obtained (pdf_manual, pdf_table, web_scrape, etc.).

fields.name: extraction_confidence
fields.description: Confidence in extracted values: high, medium, low, or unknown.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Free-text notes, caveats, or provenance details.
fields.example: Value taken from Table 2; unit inferred from caption.
